questions.question: What northern nation's geyser-heated soil allows it to grow bananas?

What two European states enjoy observer status at the United Nations?
What home appliance did the U.S. produce seven million of in 1953, up from 6,000 in 1946?
What tennis competition was dreamed up by a 20-year-old Harvard student?
What type of customer is known in lunch-counter lingo as a 'sproutsy'?
